calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Judgment Debtor MICHAEL HUANG (Tel: 415-374-1621) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court notes it did not receive a notice of contest.

The Court permits argument from judgment debtor Michael Huang.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying the judgment debtor's claim of exemption. (See signed order for details.) Certified copies of signed order mailed to parties and levying officer. (302/RBU) *****
